title: centaurea arenaria subsp. sophiae
intro: Centaurea arenaria subsp. sophiae is a plant species that is a subspecies of the mountain cornflower, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea arenaria subsp. sophiae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
